posts.title: Ableist Entrepreneurs Disadvantage Themselves
posts.summary: Ableist Entrepreneurs Disadvantage Themselves: Ableism is an intentional or unintentional system of power and privilege that ranks those with able bodies, intellects or minds over people with disabled ones. Even if they do recognize it, many entrepreneurs feel they have enough on their plate to worry about being ableist, or people with disabilities in general. […] The post Ableist Entrepreneurs Disadvantage Themselves appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
